economic_notes: Bonaparte Sales Limited Partnership reported revenue of $1,503,331 and net earnings of $477,465 for the year. 1049280 BC Ltd. also held as GBE. COVID-19 pandemic noted as potential ongoing impact. Natural disaster in summer 2018 damaged Band assets with no assessment completed.
notes: Audit is qualified due to CMHC social housing tangible capital assets being amortized at a rate equivalent to annual principal reduction of related long-term debt rather than over estimated useful lives per PSAS. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: 1049280 BC Ltd. and Bonaparte Sales Limited Partnership. RBC loans are technically due on demand due to inability to provide financial statements to RBC. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($3,928,230) + FNHA ($667,310) + Government of Canada ($86,499) + CMHC ($74,681) + Province of BC ($1,571,942) = $6,328,662. OSR calculated as total revenue ($8,706,007) minus total government transfers ($6,328,662) = $2,377,345. Expenses_administration includes both Administration ($1,539,289) from statement of operations; segment disclosure shows Administration total expenses of $2,006,914 which includes amortization. Natural resources and economic development expenses of $2,101,321 not mapped to a standard category. Capital expenses of $590,771 also not mapped. No remuneration schedule found in the document.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
